zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Hill of Bridgnorth於1294年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾納什時，他的父親Sir. Richard White Mere Hill de  la Hull26歲，母親Lady Madam Alice Giffard Baggard19歲。他和Lady Alice Baggard至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1349年在英國史洛普爾享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾納什。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Hill of Bridgnorth于1294年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾納什时，他的父亲Sir. Richard White Mere Hill de  la Hull26岁，母亲Lady Madam Alice Giffard Baggard19岁。他和Lady Alice Baggard至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1349年在英国史洛普爾享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾納什。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Hill of Bridgnorth was born in 1294, in Nash, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir. Richard White Mere Hill de  la Hull, was 26 and his mother, Lady Madam Alice Giffard Baggard, was 19. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Lady Alice Baggard. He died in 1349, in Shropshire, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in Nash, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Hill of Bridgnorth est né en 1294, à Nash, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir. Richard White Mere Hill de  la Hull, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Madam Alice Giffard Baggard, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Lady Alice Baggard. Il est décédé en 1349, à Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Nash, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Hill of Bridgnorth 1294 in Nash, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir. Richard White Mere Hill de  la Hull 26 und seine Mutter Lady Madam Alice Giffard Baggard 19. Er hatte mit Lady Alice Baggard mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1349 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Shropshire, England und wurde in Nash, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Hill of Bridgnorth è nato il nel 1294 nel Nash, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir. Richard White Mere Hill de  la Hull, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lady Madam Alice Giffard Baggard, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Lady Alice Baggard. Morì nel 1349, nel Shropshire, England, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Nash, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Hill of Bridgnorthが1294年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアナッシュで生まれた時，父Sir. Richard White Mere Hill de  la Hullは26歳，母Lady Madam Alice Giffard Baggardは19歳であった。彼はLady Alice Baggardとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1349年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアナッシュにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Hill of Bridgnorth(이)가 1294년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 나시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir. Richard White Mere Hill de  la Hull(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Madam Alice Giffard Baggard(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Lady Alice Baggard(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1349년 영국 슈럽실르에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 나시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Hill of Bridgnorth nasceu em 1294, em Nash, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir. Richard White Mere Hill de  la Hull, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Madam Alice Giffard Baggard, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Lady Alice Baggard. Ele faleceu em 1349, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Nash, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Hill of Bridgnorth родился в 1294 г. в местности наш, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir. Richard White Mere Hill de  la Hull было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Madam Alice Giffard Baggard, 19. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Lady Alice Baggard. Он умер в 1349 г. в местности шропшир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности наш, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Hill of Bridgnorth nació en 1294, en Nash, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir. Richard White Mere Hill de  la Hull, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Madam Alice Giffard Baggard, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Lady Alice Baggard. Murió en 1349, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Nash, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
